title: Physical AI Task Plan
description: Schema-style documentation for planner output before conversion to pai_task_msgs/msg/TaskPlan.

task_id.description: Stable identifier for the generated task plan.

task_type.description: Allowed task type. Unsupported commands must use unsupported.

object_name.description: Object to manipulate. Use an empty string for unsupported tasks.

source_location.description: Source location for the object. Use an empty string for unsupported tasks.

target_location.description: Destination location for the object. Use an empty string for unsupported tasks.

steps.description: Ordered list of allowed step strings. Unsupported tasks must use an empty list.
